_README: Stream Slate — game list. Edit this file and push to update the calendar. date: "YYYY-MM-DD" (day), "YYYY-MM" (month), "YYYY-Q3"/"Holiday 2026"/"Spring 2027" (quarter), "YYYY" (year -> rail), "TBD" (rail). dateLabel: optional display override. endDate: event window end. kind: game|dlc|event. basis: self|remake-original|series-avg|estimate|calibrated. hltbHours calibrated to @nabunan's real stream completion times (Jun 2026): default = HLTB Main+Extra; 100% only for short/FPS/arcade/cheap-completion games; long RPGs/collectathons stay Main+Extra (never full 100%). See SLATE.md.

games.title: DK Challenge
games.hltbNote: Fixed personal stream-challenge window, not an HLTB playthrough.

games.title: Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition (NS2) — Pt. 1
games.hltbNote: Calibrated → Main+Extra (you sidequest RPGs; cf. FireRed). Pt 1 of 3 of XC1 DE (M+E ~75h total, spread Jun–Aug).
games.partGoal: Through Prison Island (1st visit) — Colony 9 to the Eryth Sea/Alcamoth arc; reach Valak Mountain.

games.title: Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition (NS2) — Pt. 2
games.hltbNote: Calibrated → Main+Extra. Pt 2 of 3 of XC1 DE (M+E ~75h total, spread Jun–Aug).
games.partGoal: Valak Mountain through the Mechonis landing — Sword Valley, Galahad Fortress, the Fallen Arm, up to Agniratha.

games.title: Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition (NS2) — Pt. 3
games.hltbNote: Calibrated → Main+Extra. Pt 3 of 3 of XC1 DE (M+E ~75h total, spread Jun–Aug).
games.partGoal: Agniratha & the Mechonis Core through the Bionis interior to the ending.
